channel.title: mad345_syllabus on FALL 2020-2021
channel.description: Recent content in mad345_syllabus on FALL 2020-2021

item.title: MAD345 Weekly Schedule (Underground Part)
item.description: Dear all, I have set zoom meeting link for MAD345. Check out its detail here Below, you can find detailed weekly schedule of MAD345 for underground mining part GE Date Topic October 7 Introduction October 9 Rocks, minerals and mineral inventory evaluation October 14 Mining Method Selection October 15 Ground Mechanics October 21 Supports October 22 Drilling October 28 Underground Development October 29 Explosives and blasting November 4 Underground Extraction November 5 Transportation – Haulage And Hoisting November 11 Sustainable Development November 12 Planning for mine closure November 18 Midterm 1
